subcodes.first_line: O Jamshid! Become thou a person of noble strength, find thy way to the lofty palace, and take refuge in the impregnable fortress. The true palace is the heart [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای جمشید شخص رشید شو و بقصر مشید راه یاب و بحصن حصین ملتجی شو قصر حقیقی قلب
subcodes.subjects: @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @spiritual transformation, @wine as symbol of spiritual transformation
